title: Nursery Rhyme. DLXXV. Natural History.
content:
There was an old woman had three cows,
                Rosy, and Colin, and Dun;
        Rosy and Colin were sold at the fair,
        And Dun broke his head in a fit of despair
        And there was an end of her three cows,
                Rosy, and Colin, and Dun.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DLXXV. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
